Package com.govsim.govsim.simulation

Class SimuEngineGUI

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.simulation.SimuEngine
com.govsim.govsim.simulation.SimuEngineGUI
public class SimuEngineGUI extends SimuEngine
GUI simulation engine — extends SimuEngine with GUI support

    • blockAdvance

      private volatile boolean blockAdvance
      Hard block: when true, advanceDayForGUI() does nothing. Set to true before showing monthly/annual popup, set back to false after popup is dismissed.

      private volatile int pendingAnnualYear
